---
title: "Análisis de Sensibilidad - MEGC Chile 12 sectores"
author: "Generado"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
library(gEcon)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(lhs)
library(sensitivity)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(yaml)
# library(furrr) # Opcional para paralelizar

source("build_and_calibrate.R")

cfg <- yaml::read_yaml("config_modelo_chile_12sect_2023.yml")

# Dependencias auxiliares
vars_to_compare <- c(
    "Tax", "FIRMTAX", "PITAX", "VAT", "TPROD", "TESP", "TARANCEL", "SAV", "SAVf", "SAVg", "TOTAL_SAV", "SAVext", "TRGOV", "INC", "BTINC", "INGG",
    paste0("w__", unlist(cfg$cuentas_sam$factores$trabajo)),
    "pk", "exr", "inv_adj", "inv_adj_h", "inv_adj_f", "U",
    paste0("u_rate__", unlist(cfg$cuentas_sam$factores$trabajo)),
    paste0("LD__", unlist(cfg$cuentas_sam$factores$trabajo))
)

calc_pib <- function(model_obj) {
    ss_vals <- get_ss_values(model_obj)
    par_vals <- get_par_values(model_obj)
    p_names <- unlist(cfg$productos)
    p_eq <- ss_vals[paste0("p__", p_names)]
    
    C <- sum(ss_vals[paste0("D__", p_names)] * p_eq, na.rm = TRUE)
    inv_adj_val <- ss_vals["inv_adj"]
    if (is.na(inv_adj_val) || length(inv_adj_val) == 0) inv_adj_val <- 1.0
    G_val <- sum(par_vals[paste0("gg_market_data_p__", p_names)] * p_eq, na.rm = TRUE)
    I_val <- sum(par_vals[paste0("I_data__", p_names)] * p_eq, na.rm = TRUE) * inv_adj_val
    V_val <- sum(par_vals[paste0("vexist__", p_names)] * p_eq, na.rm = TRUE)
    pe_eq <- ss_vals[paste0("pe__", p_names)]
    E_vals <- ss_vals[paste0("EX__", p_names)]
    X_val <- sum(E_vals * pe_eq, na.rm = TRUE)
    pwm_eq <- par_vals[paste0("pworldm__", p_names)]
    exr_val <- ss_vals["exr"]
    M_vals <- ss_vals[paste0("M__", p_names)]
    M_val <- sum(M_vals * pwm_eq * exr_val, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    p_base <- rep(1.0, length(p_names))
    C_real <- sum(ss_vals[paste0("D__", p_names)] * p_base, na.rm = TRUE)
    G_real <- sum(par_vals[paste0("gg_market_data_p__", p_names)] * p_base, na.rm = TRUE)
    I_real <- sum(par_vals[paste0("I_data__", p_names)] * p_base, na.rm = TRUE) * inv_adj_val
    V_real <- sum(par_vals[paste0("vexist__", p_names)] * p_base, na.rm = TRUE)
    X_real <- sum(E_vals * p_base, na.rm = TRUE)
    M_real <- sum(M_vals * pwm_eq * 1.0, na.rm = TRUE)  
    
    list(C=C, G=G_val, I=I_val, V=V_val, X=X_val, M=M_val, 
         PIB = C + G_val + I_val + V_val + X_val - M_val,
         C_real=C_real, G_real=G_real, I_real=I_real, V_real=V_real, X_real=X_real, M_real=M_real,
         PIB_real = C_real + G_real + I_real + V_real + X_real - M_real,
         u_rate = ss_vals[paste0("u_rate__", unlist(cfg$cuentas_sam$factores$trabajo))],
         Tax = ss_vals["Tax"], FIRMTAX = ss_vals["FIRMTAX"], PITAX = ss_vals["PITAX"],
         VAT = ss_vals["VAT"], TPROD = ss_vals["TPROD"], TESP = ss_vals["TESP"],
         TARANCEL = ss_vals["TARANCEL"])
}

calc_tax_impact <- function(res_base, res_shock, pib_base, pib_real_base, pib_shock_list, vars) {
    price_vars <- c(paste0("w__", unlist(cfg$cuentas_sam$factores$trabajo)), "pk", "exr")
    comp <- data.frame(
        Variable = vars,
        Base = as.numeric(res_base[vars]),
        Shock = as.numeric(res_shock[vars]),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    comp$Cambio_Pct <- round((comp$Shock / comp$Base - 1) * 100, 4)
    comp$Impacto_PIB_Pct <- ifelse(
        comp$Variable %in% price_vars,
        NA,
        round((comp$Shock - comp$Base) / pib_real_base * 100, 4)
    )
    return(comp)
}

# Funciones de shocks
vat_shock_fn <- function(m) {
    p_names <- paste0("prod_", c("Agri", "Min", "Manu", "elect_agua_gas", "const", "com_hot_rest", "trans_comu_inf", "int_fin", "inmo_viv", "serv_emp", "serv_pers", "adm_pub"))
    vat_names <- paste0("vat__", p_names)
    vat_base <- get_par_values(m)[vat_names]
    vat_shock <- as.list(as.numeric(vat_base) * 1.01)
    names(vat_shock) <- vat_names
    set_free_par(m, free_par = vat_shock)
}

```

## Configuración y Funciones de Sensibilidad

```{r config}
param_ranges <- list(
  omega   = c(0.5, 2.5),
  sigma_q = c(1.05, 4.0),
  sigma_t = c(0.5, 3.0),
  phi     = c(0.05, 0.15),
  eta     = c(0.2, 1.0)
)

shocks <- list(
  iva = vat_shock_fn,
  pit = function(m) set_free_par(m, free_par = list(pit = as.numeric(get_par_values(m)["pit"])*1.10)),
  fit = function(m) set_free_par(m, free_par = list(fit = as.numeric(get_par_values(m)["fit"])*(1 - 0.916*0.01/0.27)))
)

recalibrar <- function(par_set) {
  cfg2 <- cfg
  cfg2$elasticidades$utilidad_hogares_omega <- par_set$omega
  cfg2$elasticidades$armington_sigma_q      <- par_set$sigma_q
  cfg2$elasticidades$cet_sigma_t            <- par_set$sigma_t
  cfg2$elasticidades$wage_curve_phi         <- par_set$phi
  cfg2$elasticidades$inversion_eta          <- par_set$eta
  res <- build_and_calibrate(cfg2)
  res$result
}

correr <- function(par_set, shock_name) {
  # Recalibración
  m_base_opt <- safely(recalibrar)(par_set)
  if (is.null(m_base_opt$result)) return(tibble(shock = shock_name, !!!par_set, convergio = FALSE))
  m_base <- m_base_opt$result
  
  res_b <- get_ss_values(m_base)
  pib_b <- calc_pib(m_base)
  
  # Shock
  m_shock <- shocks[[shock_name]](m_base)
  m_shock_opt <- safely(steady_state)(m_shock, calibration = FALSE,
              options_list = list(xscalm="auto", max_iter=10000, tol=3e-5))
  if (is.null(m_shock_opt$result)) return(tibble(shock = shock_name, !!!par_set, convergio = FALSE))
  m_shock <- m_shock_opt$result
  
  res_s <- get_ss_values(m_shock)
  pib_s <- calc_pib(m_shock)
  
  comp <- calc_tax_impact(res_b, res_s, pib_b$PIB, pib_b$PIB_real, pib_s, vars_to_compare)
  
  # Variables adicionales (PIB Real)
  var_pib_real <- (pib_s$PIB_real / pib_b$PIB_real - 1) * 100
  comp <- bind_rows(comp, data.frame(Variable = "PIB_real", Base=pib_b$PIB_real, Shock=pib_s$PIB_real, Cambio_Pct=var_pib_real, Impacto_PIB_Pct=NA, stringsAsFactors=F))
  
  tibble(shock = shock_name, !!!par_set, convergio = TRUE) %>%
    bind_cols(comp %>% select(Variable, Cambio_Pct, Impacto_PIB_Pct))
}
```

## Pruebas
```{r test_run, eval=FALSE}
# Correr una prueba pequeña
cat("Test run OAT (1 par, 1 shock)...\n")
p1 <- list(omega=1.5, sigma_q=2.0, sigma_t=1.5, phi=0.1, eta=0.5)
res_test <- correr(p1, "iva")
print(head(res_test))
```

## Capa 1: One-at-a-Time (OAT)

```{r oat_run, cache=TRUE}
# Generar la grilla OAT
grilla_oat <- map_dfr(names(param_ranges), function(p) {
  vals <- seq(param_ranges[[p]][1], param_ranges[[p]][2], length.out = 5) # 5 puntos
  df <- expand.grid(valor = vals, shock = names(shocks), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df$parametro_var <- p
  
  # Llenar el resto con los valores base
  base_vals <- list(omega=1.5, sigma_q=2.0, sigma_t=1.5, phi=0.1, eta=0.5)
  for (nm in names(base_vals)) {
    if (nm != p) df[[nm]] <- base_vals[[nm]]
  }
  
  # Asignar el valor variable
  for (i in 1:nrow(df)) {
    df[[p]][i] <- df$valor[i]
  }
  
  df
})

# Correr OAT
resultados_oat <- pmap_dfr(grilla_oat, function(...) {
  args <- list(...)
  par_set <- list(omega=args$omega, sigma_q=args$sigma_q, sigma_t=args$sigma_t, phi=args$phi, eta=args$eta)
  res <- correr(par_set, args$shock)
  res$parametro_var <- args$parametro_var
  res$valor_var <- args$valor
  res
})

write.csv(resultados_oat, "../output/resultados_sensibilidad_oat.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```



## Capa 3 y 4: LHS y Sobol

```{r lhs_sobol, eval=FALSE}
N <- 128 # Muestras
H <- randomLHS(N, length(param_ranges))

muestras <- as_tibble(mapply(function(col, rng) rng[1] + col*(rng[2]-rng[1]),
                              as.data.frame(H), param_ranges))
names(muestras) <- names(param_ranges)

resultados_lhs <- expand_grid(muestras, shock = names(shocks)) %>%
  pmap_dfr(function(...) {
    args <- list(...)
    par_set <- list(omega=args$omega, sigma_q=args$sigma_q, sigma_t=args$sigma_t, phi=args$phi, eta=args$eta)
    correr(par_set, args$shock)
  })

write.csv(resultados_lhs, "../output/resultados_sensibilidad_lhs.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Ejemplo de Sobol sobre el PIB Real
library(sensitivity)
y_pib <- resultados_lhs %>% filter(shock=="iva", Variable=="PIB_real", convergio==TRUE) %>% pull(Cambio_Pct)

# Nota: Para sobolSalt se requieren dos matrices X1, X2 independientes de LHS. 
# Esto es un ejemplo simplificado.
```
